title: Star Wars: Episode I Insider's Guide
content:
{{Top|rwm|leg|ref|title=''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Insider's Guide''}} {{VideoGame |not_appearance=1 |image=[[File:SWEPIGuide.png]] |title=''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Insider's Guide'' |developer=[[LucasArts]] |publisher=LucasArts |release date=*[[June 17]], [[1999]]{{WebCite|url=https://publicrecords.copyright.gov/detailed-record/voyager_11771483|text=Star Wars, episode 1 :insider's guide.|work=the [[Wikipedia:United States Copyright Office|U.S. Copyright Office Public Records System]]|archivedate=20251007155505}} *[[July 7]], [[1999]]{{WebCite|url=https://publicrecords.copyright.gov/detailed-record/voyager_11771469|text=Star Wars, episode 1 :insider's guide.|work=the [[Wikipedia:United States Copyright Office|U.S. Copyright Office Public Records System]]|archivedate=20251007161337}} |closed= |upc= |engine= |genre=Reference |modes= |ratings=[[Wikipedia:ESRB|ESRB]]: Everyone (E) |platforms=[[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]], [[Wikipedia:Macintosh|Macintosh]], [[Wikipedia:PlayStation|PlayStation]] |series= |basegame= |expansions= |director= |producer= |designer= |programmer= |artist= |writer= |composer= |timeline= |prev= |next= }} The '''''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Insider's Guide''''' was a computer program released on CD-ROM by [[LucasArts]] in [[June]] [[1999]]. It is a thorough guide of over 500 entries to the characters, technology, vehicles, and locations of [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]. It also includes behind the scenes details, official trailers and posters of the film, additional information on the previously released films of the saga, and a guide to Expanded Universe material relating to Episode I. The format of the guide is very similar to the ''[[Star Wars: Behind the Magic]]'' CD-ROM released in the previous year. ==Contents - Disc 1 {{SectionFlag|1}}== [[File:Episode_I_Insiders_Guide_menu_screen.jpg|250px|thumb|Main menu screen]] ===Characters=== Most bulleted entries can be "Explore[d]", each of those offering: a "Full Description", an "Image Gallery", a "Behind the Scenes" and "BtS Images" gallery, some "Audio Clip" and a "Trivia" question. ====Main Characters==== *[[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Queen Amidala]] *[[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]] *[[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] *[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] *[[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] *[[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] *[[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] *[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] ====Other characters====
*Anakin's Friends *[[Sio Bibble/Legends|Sio Bibble]] *[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] *[[Fodesinbeed Annodue/Legends|Fode & Beed]] *[[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senators]] *[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] *Jedi Order **[[Depa Billaba/Legends|Depa Billaba]] **[[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] **[[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]] **[[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]] **[[Eeth Koth/Legends|Eeth Koth]] **[[Even Piell/Legends|Even Piell]] **[[Yarael Poof/Legends|Yarael Poof]] **[[Oppo Rancisis/Legends|Oppo Rancisis]] **[[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]] **[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] **[[Yaddle/Legends|Yaddle]] **[[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]]
*[[Naboo Royal Handmaidens/Legends|Naboo Royal Handmaidens]] *[[Rugor Nass/Legends|Boss Nass]] *[[Palpatine/Legends|Senator Palpatine]] *[[Quarsh Panaka/Legends|Captain Panaka]] *[[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]] *[[Shmi Skywalker Lars/Legends|Shmi Skywalker]] *[[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]] *[[Roos Tarpals/Legends|Captain Tarpals]] *Trade Federation **[[Daultay Dofine/Legends|Daultay Dofine]] **[[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]] **[[Rune Haako/Legends|Rune Haako]] **[[OOM-9/Legends|OOM-9]] **[[TC-14/Legends|TC-14]] *[[Finis Valorum/Legends|Supreme Chancellor Valorum]] *[[Watto/Legends|Watto]]

====Aliens & Creatures====
*'''Aliens''' **[[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] **[[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] **[[Ishi Tib/Legends|Ishi Tib]] **[[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]] **[[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidians]] **[[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] **[[Rodian/Legends|Rodians]] **[[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarians]] **[[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]] **[[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'leks]]
*'''Creatures''' **[[Bantha/Legends|Bantha]] **[[Colo claw fish/Legends|Colo Claw Fish]] **[[Dewback/Legends|Dewbacks]] **[[Eopie/Legends|Eopie]] **[[Falumpaset/Legends|Falumpaset]] **[[Fambaa/Legends|Fambaa]] **[[Kaadu/Legends|Kaadu]] **Naboo Creatures **[[Opee sea killer/Legends|Opee Sea Killer]] **[[Ronto/Legends|Ronto]] **[[Sando aqua monster/Legends|Sando Aqua Monster]]

====Groups & Organizations==== *[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi]] *[[Naboo Royal Advisory Council/Legends|Naboo Advisory Council]] *[[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Naboo Royal Security Forces]] *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] *[[Senate Guard/Legends|Senate Guard]] *[[Sith/Legends|Sith]] *[[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] ===Technology===
====Weapons==== *[[S-5 heavy blaster pistol/Legends|Ascension Guns]] *[[Blaster/Legends|Blaster]] & [[Blaster rifle/Legends|Blaster Rifle]] *[[Booma/Legends|Energy Balls]] *[[Electropole/Legends|Electropole]] *[[Gungan catapult/Legends|Gungan Energy Catapult]] *[[Atlatl/Legends|Atlatl]] *[[Cesta/Legends|Cesta]] *[[Laser cannon/Legends|Laser Cannons]] *[[Lightsaber/Legends|Lightsaber]] *[[Quad laser cannon/Legends|Quad Laser Cannon]] ====Devices==== *[[Comlink/Legends|Comlink]] *[[A99 aquata breather/Legends|Breathing Device]] *[[Electrobinoculars/Legends|Electrobinoculars]] *[[Gungan shield generator|Gungan Energy Shield]] *[[Holoprojector/Legends|Holoprojector]] *[[Hyperdrive/Legends|Hyperdrive]] *[[Jedi testing screen/Legends|Jedi Testing Screen]] *[[Mechno-chair/Legends|Mechno-Chair]] *[[Viewscreen/Legends|Viewscreen]]
====Droids==== *[[Astromech droid/Legends|Astromech Droid]] *[[Battle droid/Legends|Battle Droid]] *[[Droideka/Legends|Droideka]] *[[Power droid/Legends|Power Droid]] *[[DUM-series pit droid/Legends|Pit Droid]] *[[Hologlide J57 cam droid/Legends|Podrace Cam Droid]] *[[Protocol droid/Legends|Protocol Droid]] *[[Senate cam droid/Legends|Senate Cam Droid]] *[[DRK-1 Dark Eye probe droid/Legends|Sith Probe Droid]]

===Vehicles===
*'''Trade Federation''' **[[Armored Assault Tank/Legends|Armored Assault Tank]] {{ID|Armored Attack Tank}} **[[Lucrehulk-class battleship|Droid Control Ship]] **[[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|Droid Starfighter]] **[[C-9979 landing craft/Legends|Landing Ship]] **[[Single Trooper Aerial Platform/Legends|STAP]] **[[Multi-Troop Transport/Legends|Multi Troop Transport]] *'''Naboo''' **[[Tribubble bongo/Legends|Bongo]] **[[Seraph-class urban landspeeder|Flash Speeder]] **[[V-19 landspeeder|Gian Speeder]] **[[J-type 327 Nubian royal starship/Legends|Naboo Royal Starship]] **[[N-1 starfighter/Legends|Naboo Starfighter]]
*'''Republic''' **[[EasyRide passenger airspeeder/Legends|Air Taxi]] **[[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|Republic Cruiser]] *'''Sith''' **[[Scimitar/Legends|Infiltrator]] **[[Bloodfin/Legends|Sith Speeder]] *'''Podracers''' **Podracer Map *'''Charts''' **Vehicle Size Charts

===Locations=== *[[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] **[[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] **[[Palpatine's apartment/Legends|Palpatine's Quarters]] **[[Grand Convocation Chamber|Galactic Senate Chamber]] *[[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] **[[Otoh Gunga/Legends|Otoh Gunga]] **[[High Board Room/Legends|High Board Room]] **[[Gungan Sacred Place/Legends|Gungan Sacred Place]] **[[Gungan Swamp|Naboo Swamp]] **[[Theed/Legends|Theed]] **[[Theed Royal Palace/Legends|Theed Royal Palace]] **[[Theed Hangar/Legends|Theed Hangar]] **[[Plasma Refinery Complex|Power Generator Area]] **[[Great Grass Plains/Legends|Naboo Battlefield]] *[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] **[[Slave Quarters Row/Legends|Anakin's Hovel]] **[[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]] **[[Mos Espa Grand Arena/Legends|Mos Espa Arena]] **[[Wald's Parts|Watto's Shop]] ===The Phantom Menace=== *Posters & Trailers *Scene by Scene ==Contents - Disc 2 {{SectionFlag|1}}== ===The ''Star Wars'' Saga=== *[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|Episode I]] *[[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|Episode II]] *[[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|Episode III]] *[[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|Episode IV]] *[[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|Episode V]] *[[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|Episode VI]] *Writing for the ''Star Wars'' Universe ===Behind the scenes=== *'''People''' *'''Timeline''' *Art Direction *Bluescreen Process *Casting *Computer Graphics *Concept Art *Costume Design *Creature Shop *Directing *Location Shooting *Motion Control *Model Making *Music *Pyrotechnics *Set Design *Sound Effects *Animatics *Stunts *Matte Painting ===Expanded Universe=== *'''Sources''' ==Glossary {{SectionFlag|1}}== [[File:Episode_I_Insiders_Guide_Glossary.jpg|250px|thumb|The Glossary]] Found on both discs, the glossary is an encyclopedia-like reference source, based on selected information from the film and various spin-off materials available at the time. The list is sortable into various categories: *Alien Species *Characters - Aliens *Characters - Droids *Characters - Human *Events *Flora and Fauna *Groups and Organizations *Locations - Cities *Locations - Misc *Locations - Planets *Locations - Space *Locations - Systems *Technology *Terminology *Vehicles (named) *Vehicles (types) *Weapons ==Release and reception== The ''Insider's Guide'' was released in Portuguese by [[BraSoft]] as, ''Star Wars Episódio I Por Trás das Câmeras Insider's Guide''.{{WebCite|url=https://www.brasoft.com.br/portrasdascameras/index.html|text=''Por Trás das Câmeras''™|author=[[BraSoft]]|archivedate=20001024140721|nolive=1}} ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars: Episode I Insider's Guide}} {{IncompleteApp}} {{App |characters= |creatures= |droids= |events= |locations= |organizations= |species= |vehicles= |technology= |miscellanea= *[[Clothing/Legends|Clothing]] **[[Cannom collar/Legends|Cannom collar]] {{Po}} }} ==Sources== *{{SWArchive|url=gaming/videogames/news/news19990623.html|text=''Star Wars:'' Episode I ''Insider's Guide''}} *{{CollectorCite|7|Around the Galaxy}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{LucasArts|url=products/episode1guide|text=''Star Wars: Episode I Insider's Guide'' Official Site}} {{Episode1Multimedia}} {{Interlang |es=Star Wars: Episode I Insider's Guide |ka=ვარსკვლავური ომები, ეპიზოდი I: მეგზური |nl=Episode I Insider's Guide }} [[Category:Legends reference books]] [[Category:Real-world reference books]]
